name: Honey Molasses Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon together into a large bowl.
2. Mix in the sugar, removing any lumps.
3. Add the honey, molasses, and yogurt to the dry ingredients; mix until well blended.
4. Prepare the pan by lightly greasing it with oil (lining the pan with parchment paper and swiping the parchment with oil for easier cleanup is recommended).
5. Bake in a 2 small or 1 large loaf pan at 275°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes (1 hour if you prefer it more moist).
6. Allow to cool.
7. Place on parchment paper; pour the brandy over the cake slowly so it can soak in.
8. Wrap in the same parchment paper and plastic wrap, then let age for 3 days in the refrigerator before cutting.
